full_text:
Liu Jing (Wengong) 劉靖 (文恭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Jing (劉靖), styledWengong (文恭). Mourned the death of his father Liu Fu. Liu Jing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
